steps.title: Set up the unit conversion
steps.content: To convert from flyers per minute to flyers per hour, we need to multiply by the number of minutes in an hour. Since 1 hour = 60 minutes, multiply the given rate by 60.

steps.title: Calculate the hourly production rate
steps.content:
The printer produces 36 flyers per minute. Multiplying by 60:
$$36 \times 60 = 2160 \text{ flyers/hour}$$
